channel.title: Problem Sets on MIT OpenCourseWare
channel.description: Recent content in Problem Sets on MIT OpenCourseWare

item.title: MIT18_01SC_pset1prb.pdf
item.description: This resource contains problem sets of differentiation.

item.title: MIT18_01SC_pset1sol.pdf
item.description: This resource contains solutions to differentiation.

item.description: This resource contains problem sets of applications of differentiation.
